pr.title: Deduplicate incoming ids
pr.description: Removes duplicate ids from a request.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+def unique(items):
+    result = []
+    for item in items:
+        if item not in result:
+            result.append(item)
+    return result
+

planted_defects.description: Quadratic complexity: 'item not in result' scans the growing list on every iteration, making deduplication O(n^2); a set would make it O(n).
